# FinanceStore.ContainsOrderResult.notFound

**Case**

The specified order doesn’t exist.

## Declaration

```swift
case notFound
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **FinanceStore.ContainsOrderResult.exists**: The specified order exists.
- **FinanceStore.ContainsOrderResult.newerExists**: A newer order than the one you specified exists.
- **FinanceStore.ContainsOrderResult.olderExists**: A older order than the one you specified exists.

items.description: A newer order than the one you specified exists.
